standard: NIST SP 800-218 Secure Software Development Framework 1.1
interpretation: Evidence is mapped to the SSDF common vocabulary. This is neither a complete task-by-task assessment nor NIST certification.

practices.name: Prepare the Organization
practices.remaining: Assign controlled organizational roles, training records, risk tolerances, and approval authorities outside the source repository.

practices.name: Protect the Software
practices.remaining: Repository branch/ruleset enforcement and consumer-side attestation policy are externally administered controls.

practices.name: Produce Well-Secured Software
practices.remaining: Complete the ASVS requirement assessment and independent penetration test; retain threat-model reviews for significant architecture changes.

practices.name: Respond to Vulnerabilities
practices.remaining: Retain organization-controlled incident, remediation-SLA, disclosure, and root-cause records for actual vulnerability reports.
